# CG艺术实验室

> 专注于数字艺术、动态视觉设计，技术分享和知识管理的创意工作室。

## 近期文章

- [AI时代的创意工具 - No.16玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-16): AI工具已从“赋能”卖点变为行业标配，但核心问题在于：它们是在扩展还是抹平创作边界？
- [工具塑造创作方式 - No.15 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-15): 从专业软件到关注工作流的工具，再到主动参与的AI。这引发核心问题：当工具能“创作”，人的价值何在？答案在于判断力——在噪声中识别方向、定义意义的能力。随着执行成本下降，判断力成为创作者真正的稀缺资源。
- [当AI开始记住你的一切，这是我的使用策略 - No.14 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-14): 2026 年，大模型平台几乎同时做出了一个关键选择：新增「复杂任务」和「长期记忆」功能。只是每家可能会有不同的叫法，有的也限制了免费额度。这是 AI 进化的必然。
- [世界尽管让它去转，不用担心你学的东西会过时](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/dont-worry-what-your-learning-will-pass): 2026 刚开始两个月，AI 行业已经从“模型版本竞赛”到“Agent 代理”全面转向。如何让 AI 像员工一样自主工作、互相合作，已经开始重构我的常规工作流。在体验了一个月从 0 到 1 地和 OpenClaw 部署、设计、开发、协作之后，我认为应该写一篇文章好好沉淀一下近些年自己对 AI 技术的体验和思考。
- [你和AI聊过的天，可能并不属于你 - No.13 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-13): 我从上大学真正接触网络开始，就信不过任何云盘和云服务。这种感觉从移动互联网发展起来后慢慢淡化了许多，因为网络随处都有。但当 AI 出现之后我才真正意识到，个人数据是多宝贵的财富。同时，我也认为这是目前大多数使用这些 AI 平台的人容易忽视的地方。
- [「左脚踩右脚」的创作方法 - No.12 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-12): 左脚踩右脚是啥意思呢？且听我给你慢慢道来.....
- [就算掌声无法抵达舞台，我依然劝你尽快动笔](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/pick-your-pencil-now): 封面图来自 Dan Koe 的个人网站，即使是 AI 画的，我也很喜欢这张图。这个画面让我想起去留学那天，一个人从机场走出来到陌生的国度，就是这种前面是无尽的未知，但是方向和动力又异常明确，两种看似明明相反排斥的力量，和谐统一地充斥在心里。
- [NAS 买回来只会存照片？创作者的第一台“私有云”该怎么玩 - 下篇](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/nas-beyond-photos-your-first-private-cloud-2): NAS 不只是能联网的硬盘盒，而是你的私人数据中心。这个系列旨在跳过复杂的代码和命令，告诉你如何建立最基础的创作者存储逻辑。
- [拔草记录和好物推荐-2601](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/good-things-2026-01): 利民AXP90纯铜散热器、飞傲BTR11蓝牙耳放、七彩虹RTX5070TI显卡、良工PDU机柜插座、WD40精密清洁剂。
- [NAS 买回来只会存照片？创作者的第一台“私有云”该怎么玩 - 上篇](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/nas-beyond-photos-your-first-private-cloud-1): 它不只是硬盘盒，而是你的私人数据中心。跳过复杂的命令行，告诉你如何建立最基础的创作者存储逻辑。
- [谷歌的UI设计理念 - No.11 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-11): 话说天冷了，这家伙越来越能吃（也能拉）。已经从去年刚抱回来的 4 斤半长到了 7 斤出头，拎起来已经明显感觉到压手了。从抱她回家到现在已经一年半，吃成煤气罐也没事，只要平平安安就成。
- [2025年，我的生产力设备里留下了这些优秀工具](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/good-tools-for-production-in-my-2025): 顶着这么多年设计师的头衔，我从未整体性地总结过自己用的软件应用。今年第一次冒出了想设计开发一个自己喜欢的产品，对于用户，软件是应用。对于开发者，软件是他们的产品。于是，在软件工具的选择和使用上，我逐渐开始以产品设计思维作为标准，甚至会去搜寻作者的幕后采访。随后在使用的时候会不由自主地揣摩开发者的思路。
- [圣弥厄尔教堂 - No.10 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-10): 本期封面拍摄自青岛圣弥厄尔大教堂。难得有闲暇时间可以约朋友组队出来玩一圈。国内的旅游方式，主打一个「来都来了」，几个地标还是要打个卡的。这个天主教堂其实没有想象中的大，但第一次见到了一比一的管风琴还是蛮震撼的。奇怪的是，没有见到任何修女或神父，貌似旅游旺季，他们或许放假了？
- [OpenAI推出学习模式 - No.09 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-09): 本期周刊主要讨论了OpenAI新推出的学习模式、Newsletter传播形式的优势，以及推荐了IGLOO公司的创意网站设计。
- [金沙滩的松树 - No.08 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-08): 分享个人搭建RSS服务的经验，探讨交互设计的隐形细节，并介绍迁移音乐歌单到Apple Music的实用工具。
- [双钻石设计模型：从用户需求到产品落地的黄金框架解析 - No.07 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-07): 想了解双钻石设计模型如何串联“用户需求”与“产品落地”？本文深度解析其四大阶段（发现-定义-开发-交付）的核心任务与输出成果，揭示“黄金框架”如何通过迭代设计实现从概念到实物的完整链路。无论是产品经理、设计师还是品牌策划者，都能从中获取系统化设计方法论，提升项目落地效率。
- [真正的「牛马」和 macOS 图标简史 - No.06 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-06): 从打工人的「牛马」自嘲到真实牛马的自在生存，本文以禅意视角探讨技术与设计的无常变迁。通过梳理macOS近30年图标风格的演变（拟物化→扁平化→液态玻璃），揭示苹果设计语言从功能驱动到情感表达的深层逻辑。结合WWDC 2025液态玻璃设计与AR布局猜想，提出技术革新与禅意生活的平衡之道：在数字化浪潮中，如牛马般活在当下，以开放心态拥抱未来。
- [参与造梦的艺术 - No.05 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-05): 深入探索电影制作幕后：从青岛东方影都的赛博雾景到顶尖剧组协作挑战，揭秘AI工具NotebookLM、NoteGen与硅基流动如何革新创作流程。更独家解析Mode品牌重塑双菱形框架，探讨‘暖科技’如何重构产品价值。订阅玄光周刊，获取数字艺术、知识管理与创业思维的深度洞察！
- [返修显卡和新渲染器 - No.04 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-04): 分享显卡返修经历和使用体验，介绍新发现的GPU渲染器Centileo Render的性能特点，以及近期Obsidian和Windows商店的更新内容。
- [白给的福利 - No.03 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-03): 分享作为自由职业者调整作息的经验，探讨早睡早起带来的效率提升和时间管理优势，以及如何在多种作息模式间灵活切换。
- [表上的数字很神奇 - No.02 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-02): 探讨时间知觉的奇妙现象，分析不同时间段的主观感受差异，并分享从物理老师处获得的关于时间管理的启发。
- [6月的设计师拔草记录和选荐](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/2025-06-good-things): 6月的设计师拔草记录和选荐，包含VGN蜻蜓A9 plus鼠标、3D打印腕托、日本UCC冻干咖啡、原道MX500平头塞等产品的使用体验和评价。
- ["WordPress插件商店打不开，搞定回环错误排查与修复步骤](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/fix-wordpress-plugin-store): "WordPress插件商店打不开的回环错误排查与修复步骤，包含宝塔面板和终端命令两种解决方案。
- [RSS 与现代阅读习惯（二）：重新获取信息收集的主动权](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/rss-2): 基于RSS构建个人碎片信息收集系统的实践经验分享，包含优质RSS源推荐和工具使用心得
- [发刊词 - No.01 玄光周刊](https://cgartlab.com/zh/weekly/weekly-01): 周刊从这里出发
- [12月拔草记录的好物](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/2024-12-good-things): 12月拔草记录的好物分享，包含农科院无蔗糖燕麦、Pidan猫薄荷玩具、米家石墨烯电暖器、Keychron K3 Max键盘等好物推荐。
- [再开公众号，并接入 AI](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/setup-wechat-channel-again): 重新开通微信公众号并接入AI助手的完整经验分享，包含智能体配置、知识库设置和多平台内容分发策略
- [【SCP-华夏系列组画】上线爱发电](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/scp-digital-artwork): 目前更新至第三幅 《醉奴》
- [2024年，如何更优雅地使用 Mac](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/2024-elegant-use-mac): 2024年Mac使用优化指南，从系统配置到软件选择，提升Mac使用体验和工作效率的实用技巧
- [RSS 与现代阅读习惯（一）：如何在碎片化时代重塑深度阅读体验](https://cgartlab.com/zh/posts/rss-1): 探讨如何在碎片化时代通过RSS重塑深度阅读体验，从理念到实践的全面指南

## English Articles

- ["Creative Tools in the AI Era - No.16 Black Light Weekly | Digital Art Innovation](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-16): "Analyze AI creative tools reshaping digital art in 2026. Explore Runway Gen-4, Leonardo AI, Stable Diffusion, and the debate between professionalization versus democratization of creative software.
- ["Tools Shaping How We Create - No.15 Black Light Weekly | Creative Workflow Evolution](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-15): "Explore how creative tools evolve from Photoshop to AI-powered workflows. Discover Jan local AI, Figma MCP pipelines, and Appwrite backend services that are reshaping digital creation and design processes.
- ["AI Long-Term Memory Strategy: When AI Remembers Everything - No.14 Weekly](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-14): "Master AI long-term memory features with proven strategies for ChatGPT, Claude, and other LLMs. Learn how to organize AI projects, manage conversation context, and maintain data privacy while maximizing AI productivity.
- ["Let the World Keep Turning: Why Your Skills Won't Become Obsolete in the AI Era](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/dont-worry-what-your-learning-will-pass): "Navigate the AI revolution with confidence. Discover why systematic thinking, aesthetic judgment, and creative workflows remain valuable despite AI advancement. Learn practical strategies for integrating AI tools into design and animation work.
- ["AI Data Privacy: Your Conversations Might Not Belong to You - No.13 Weekly](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-13): "Protect your AI conversation data with our guide to data sovereignty and self-hosted solutions. Learn which AI platforms allow data export and how to build a private home data center for complete control.
- ["The Left Foot Stepping on Right Foot Creative Method - No.12 Weekly | Knowledge Management](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-12): "Discover the recursive creative method linking knowledge management and content creation. Learn how to build a self-propelling creative system using interconnected notes and writing workflows for digital creators.
- ["Even If Applause Can't Reach the Stage: A Creator's Guide to Starting Your Journey](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/pick-your-pencil-now): "Overcome creative fear and start your writing or artistic journey today. Learn from Dan Koe's content strategy, discover the 'Show Your Work' philosophy, and find practical motivation for creative beginners in the digital age.
- ["NAS for Creators Part 2: Build Your Private Cloud Storage System](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/nas-beyond-photos-your-first-private-cloud-2): "Build your creator NAS storage system with our practical guide. Learn hard drive selection, RAID configuration, four-layer storage logic, and workflow optimization for creative professionals.
- ["NAS for Creators Part 1: Your First Private Cloud Setup Guide](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/nas-beyond-photos-your-first-private-cloud-1): "NAS is more than a hard drive box—it's your personal data center. Learn the basics of NAS setup for creators, from understanding storage needs to building efficient creative workflows without complex commands.
- ["Google's UI Design Philosophy - No.11 Black Light Weekly | Design Systems & Motion Awards](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-11): "Explore Google's Material Design philosophy, The Motion Awards 2025 trends, and Vitsœ's timeless design principles. Discover how systematic design thinking shapes digital products and user experiences.
- ["2025 Productivity Tools That Stayed in My Workflow | Designer Software Stack](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/good-tools-for-production-in-my-2025): "Discover the best productivity tools for designers in 2025: Notion, Obsidian, Memos, Syncthing, and more. Learn how to build a self-hosted creative workflow with our comprehensive software reviews and setup guides.
- ["St. Michael's Cathedral - No.10 Black Light Weekly | Astro Framework & Creative Tools](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-10): "Discover Astro framework for frontend development, OpenCut video editing software, and MAKING SOFTWARE design resources. Explore how historical architecture inspires timeless digital design principles for creators.
- ["OpenAI Launches Learning Mode - No.09 Black Light Weekly | AI Education Trends](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-09): "Explore OpenAI's new ChatGPT Learning Mode and AI education trends. Discover why newsletter format matters for content creators and see IGLOO's award-winning creative website design examples.
- ["The Pine Trees of Golden Beach - No.08 Black Light Weekly | RSS & Interaction Design](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-08): "Learn how to build your own RSS service and discover invisible interaction design details in iOS and macOS. Plus practical tools for migrating music playlists to Apple Music for creative professionals.
- ["Double Diamond Design Model: Golden Framework from User Needs to Product - No.07 Weekly](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-07): "Master the double diamond design model with our comprehensive guide. Learn the four stages (discover, define, develop, deliver) of this UX design framework to improve product development workflow and user-centered design processes.
- ["The Real Workhorses and macOS Icon History - No.06 Black Light Weekly | Apple Design Evolution](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-06): "Explore macOS icon design evolution from skeuomorphism to liquid glass. Discover Apple UI design philosophy changes over 30 years and learn how Zen principles can balance technology innovation with mindful living.
- ["Participating in the Art of Dream-Making - No.05 Black Light Weekly | Film Production & AI Tools](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-05): "Behind-the-scenes film production insights and AI creative workflow tools review. Explore NotebookLM, NoteGen, and brand design frameworks revolutionizing digital art and motion design industries.
- ["Refurbished Graphics Card and New Renderer - No.04 Black Light Weekly | CG Hardware Guide](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-04): "Essential graphics card maintenance tips and 3D rendering technology reviews for digital artists. Learn hardware reliability strategies and discover new rendering tools for creative workflows.
- ["Free Benefits - No.03 Black Light Weekly | Freelancer Sleep Schedule & Productivity Tips](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-03): "Discover freelancer productivity tips and early rising benefits. Learn how adjusting your sleep schedule can boost creative workflow efficiency and improve work-life balance for digital creators.
- ["The Magic Numbers on the Clock - No.02 Black Light Weekly | Time Perception & Productivity](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-02): "Explore time perception psychology and time management strategies. Discover why time feels faster as we age and how to leverage time awareness for better productivity and creative workflows.
- ["WordPress Plugin Store Loop Error: Troubleshooting & Fix Guide](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/fix-wordpress-plugin-store): "Fix WordPress plugin store loop errors with our step-by-step troubleshooting guide. Learn DNS resolution fixes using Baota Panel and terminal commands for WordPress site health restoration.
- ["RSS and Modern Reading Habits (Part 2): Regain Control Over Information Collection](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/rss-2): "Build a personal information collection system with RSS. Discover quality RSS sources, tool recommendations, and practical workflows for managing fragmented information and curating your digital reading experience.
- ["Launch Statement - No.01 Black Light Weekly | CG Art Lab](https://cgartlab.com/en/weekly/weekly-01): "Welcome to Black Light Weekly - a curated newsletter on digital art, visual design, and frontend development. Discover insights on creativity, knowledge management, and personal growth.
- ["How to Use Mac More Elegantly in 2024: Complete Optimization Guide](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/2024-elegant-use-mac): "Optimize your Mac experience in 2024 with our comprehensive guide. Discover system settings, performance tweaks, power management tips, and essential shortcuts for creative professionals using macOS.
- ["RSS and Modern Reading Habits (Part 1): Reshape Deep Reading in the Fragmented Era](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/rss-1): "Master RSS for deep reading in the digital age. Learn how to escape algorithm recommendations, build focused reading habits, and reclaim your attention span with practical RSS setup strategies.
- ["LayerRenamer 1.0: Photoshop Batch Layer Renaming Script for Designers](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/layerrenamer-1): "Download LayerRenamer 1.0 free Photoshop script for batch layer renaming. Supports custom naming rules, numbering formats, and grouping to streamline your design workflow and boost productivity.
- ["How to Use Windows PC Elegantly in 2024: Optimization & Setup Guide](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/2024-elegant-use-windows): "Master Windows 11 in 2024 with our complete optimization guide. Learn system settings, keyboard shortcuts, built-in tools like winget, and productivity tips for an efficient Windows experience.
- ["How I Built a Cloud Library: Self-Hosted E-Book Server Tutorial](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/how-to-build-library): "Build your own cloud library with this step-by-step tutorial. Learn how to set up Calibre on Proxmox VE Debian 12 VM, configure X11 forwarding, and create a personal e-book management system.
- ["Digital Art Creation Basics (Part 1): The Courage to Start Creating](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/digitalpainting1-confidence): "Begin your digital art journey with confidence. Learn fundamental concepts, overcome creative fear, and discover why starting before you're ready is the key to success in CG art and digital painting.
- ["I Still Don't Know: Authentic Perception in the Information Age](https://cgartlab.com/en/posts/know-nothing): "Explore the tension between knowledge background and pure sensory experience in art appreciation. Discover how to maintain authentic perception while navigating information overload in digital culture.
